name: Blake Belladonna |The Grimm Parasite Symbiote|
description:
What if after a day of training outside, Blake decided to enjoy the falling snow with a book? What if the one spot she chose to sit on was already occupied by a parasite... that then merged with her clothes binding to her forever? Well, look no further! This is exactly what's happening! Do whatever you want – she's stuck with you.

Part 3 of my RWBY |Grimm Parasite Symbiote| series

Part 1 is Ruby, check it out: (-Click Here-) YIPPEE!!!

Part 2 is Weiss, check it out: (-Click Here-) YIPPEE!!!

Part 4 is Yang, check it out: (-Click Here-) YIPPEE!!!

Part 5 is Neopolitan, check it out: (-Click Here-) YIPPEE!!!

Everyone is 18+
